ハーブティーが思い出させた事: What the Herbal Tea Called to Mind
ニナが差し出したティーカップと、その中に注がれたお茶の香りに、<br>娼館を訪れ:
The guest who had come to the brothel looked surprised at the
teacup Nina offered and the scent of the tea within it.
ハーブティーです。<br>お嫌いですか？: It is herbal tea. Do you not like it?
客はしばしニナの顔をじっと見つめてから、ゆっくりと首を横に振り、<br>ティーカ:
The guest stared at Nina's face for a moment, then slowly shook his
head, took the teacup, let it cool a little, and took a sip.
客は、前線基地の門番として働く男だった。<br>ニナが娼館で働き始めてから、何人:
The guest was a gatekeeper at the Frontline Base, one of many Nina
had served since starting at the brothel.
男は、ティーカップの中身がルイボスティーであることを言い当てた。<br>それは、:
The man correctly identified the tea in the cup as rooibos, and
explained that it tasted like his homeland.
そうなんですか？<br>もしよろしければ、貴方様の故郷のお話などをお聞かせいただ:
Is that so? If you would be so kind, I would be grateful to hear about
your homeland...
娼館を訪れてからほとんど口を開かない無口な男だったが、<br>懐かしい味に気持ち:
The man had been taciturn since arriving, but the nostalgic flavor
eased his heart and he began to haltingly talk about his homeland.
男はかつてハーブを育てる農夫だったという。<br>しかし、男の故郷は厄災で滅び、:
He said he had once been a farmer who cultivated herbs. But his
hometown was destroyed by the Calamity, and he lost his beloved family.
男はそんな悲しい過去に蓋をし、故郷を離れ、遠く前線基地まで来て、<br>門番とし:
He had sealed away that tragic past, left his homeland, and journeyed
to the distant Frontline Base to work as a gatekeeper.
門番という仕事を選んだのも、<br>人との接触をなるべく避けるためとのことだった:
He had chosen to become a gatekeeper to minimize contact with
others.
そうだったのですね……そんな悲しい過去が……<br>つらい記憶を思い出させてしま:
I see... such a tragic past... I apologize for making you recall those
painful memories.
ニナはそっと男の手を取ると、優しく自分の手を重ねた。:
Nina gently took the man's hand and softly placed her own hand over
it.
今だけ……今宵だけでも、貴方様からつらい過去を忘れさせ、<br>癒してさしあげた:
Even if only for tonight, I wish to help you, my lord, forget your
painful past and offer you solace...
どうかお気を楽に……そして、わたくしに身を委ねてくださいませ……<br>わたくし:
Please, feel at ease... and entrust yourself to me, my lord... I shall
serve you...
そう言うと、ニナは男の手からそっとカップを取り上げ、<br>ゆっくりとベッドへと:
So saying, Nina gently removed the cup from the man's hand and
slowly guided him to the bed.
